phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist office is
phrases.cultural_note: The tourist information office is located on the Grand-Place and provides maps, guided tour bookings, and event information.

responses.english: On the ground floor of the Maison du Roi, on the square.
responses.phonetic: oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY duh lah may-ZOHN doo RWAH, soor lah PLAHS
responses.local: Au rez-de-chaussée de la Maison du Roi, sur la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if guided tours are available
phrases.cultural_note: Guided walking tours depart from the Grand-Place regularly. They cover the square's history and nearby attractions.

responses.english: Yes, ask at the tourist office on the square.
responses.phonetic: wee, rahn-say-nyay-VOO ah loh-FEES duh too-REESM soor lah PLAHS
responses.local: Oui, renseignez-vous à l'office de tourisme sur la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the flower carpet event
phrases.text_local: Quand a lieu le tapis de fleurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: kohn ah lee-OO luh tah-PEE duh FLUR
phrases.cultural_note: A massive flower carpet (over 100,000 begonias) is displayed every two years in August. Check if your visit coincides with this spectacular event.

responses.english: It's in August, every two years. Over one hundred thousand begonias.
responses.phonetic: say tah noo-TOO, too lay duz ahn. ploo duh sahn meel bay-goh-NYAH
responses.local: C'est en août, tous les deux ans. Plus de cent mille bégonias.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des illuminations le soir ?
phrases.cultural_note: The Grand-Place is beautifully illuminated every evening. The best time for photos is during blue hour, around 9pm in summer.

responses.english: Yes, the facades are lit up every evening.
responses.phonetic: wee, lay fah-SAD son ee-loo-mee-NAY too lay SWAHR
responses.local: Oui, les façades sont illuminées tous les soirs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a good waffle nearby
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je trouver une bonne gaufre ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh troo-VAY oon bon GOHFR
phrases.cultural_note: Brussels waffles are a must-try. Quality varies around the Grand-Place. Look for fresh-made ones rather than pre-packaged.

responses.english: There are good stands in the streets around the square.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah duh bohn stahnd dahn lay roo oh-TOOR duh lah PLAHS
responses.local: Il y a de bons stands dans les rues autour de la place.
